title.en: The eighth balance realm was finally broken by ...

content.en:
"Breakthrough!"

The eighth balance realm was finally broken by Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian's physical body was transforming, but this transformation required too many resources, and the energy around him was simply not enough.

In desperation, he could only use all the resources on his body to break through, but it was still not enough.

"Let's see if we can refine the sea of heart flames, if we can, we can also make up a lot of energy. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's body began to transform into a sea of heart fireworks.

Soon.

These Heart Flame Flames were absorbed by Ye Tian and then quickly refined.

"Sure enough, my current strength is extremely strong, refining the Heart Flame Fire is very simple! "

Ye Tian muttered.

With the passage of time, this sea of heart flames was swallowed by him, which allowed his cultivation to stabilize at the eighth balance realm.

Subsequently, it took him another period of time before his strength really settled.

"The eighth balance is really much stronger than the seventh balance, with my current strength, it should not be weaker than the existence outside the prison, or even stronger than him!" Ye Tian estimated.

After all, the existence outside the prison did not necessarily show all the means.

So, he can only estimate.

Immediately, he looked through the rift in the Origin Ancestor's body and looked over.

In the darkness, the shadow of the prison appeared.

He saw the prison!

"This prison is a large array, and the defense is not strong, the purpose is to draw the origin to water that giant tree and give birth to that fruit. With my strength, it's naturally easy to break out of prison and get out. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he had other ideas, and that was to seize the fruit.

That kind of fruit must be extremely noble, otherwise there is no need for the forces outside the prison to arrange this large array, and they also sent two powerhouses beyond the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm to garrison here.

Maybe this fruit can make his strength increase unimaginably!

However, he had to seize the time to snatch the fruit when it was about to ripen.

"Let's go and see how this fruit is going. "

Ye Tian was ready to enter from the depths of the Reincarnation Domain's origin.

Soon.

He arrived at the origin of the reincarnation domain, and the powerhouses of the reincarnation clan sensed it, but they didn't dare to stop Ye Tian.

When Ye Tian walked towards the forbidden area in the depths of the Reincarnation Domain, the powerhouses of the Reincarnation Clan were shocked.

"This Endless Lord actually wants to go in? he can't find death, the last time so many of our Origin Upper Realm Overlords arranged a prison to break the prison array, they were all hit hard, and so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords fell, his strength is indeed far superior to ours, but it is no match for the two existences outside the prison!"

They were confused, but they didn't stop it.

Click!

Ye Tian walked into the forbidden area and came to a place close to the prison.

Here, he clearly saw the existence of the prison and the giant tree.

Rumble!!!!

The two pairs of eyes looked at each other in a flash.

"Another little bug has come out!"

Shaking Shadow instantly made a move, wanting to pinch Ye Tian to death.

However.

Ye Tian went back quickly, and the speed was so fast that Shaking Shadow only caught a shadow.

"Run, it's pretty fast!"

Shake Shadow frowned slightly.

He didn't think too much about it, and he didn't think that Ye Tian's strength could be comparable to his own, he only thought that Ye Tian's reaction was a little fast.

......

"That fruit is about to ripen!"

Ye Tian saw that fruit, and if he calculated it again, he knew that the fruit would be completely ripe at most thirty million primeval era years according to this absorption rate.

Fortunately, he broke through at this time, otherwise he would not be qualified to compete for that fruit.

"When that fruit is ripe, those two will have to leave here and give up here!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He quietly waited for the path of time, and during this period, he would often go out to have a look, anyway, with his strength, the existence that surpassed the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm would not be able to catch him.

But before snatching that fruit, he won't make a move, otherwise he will expose his strength, and the other party will be vigilant.

Before you know it, another 30 million primeval years have passed.

During this time, the only thing he did was to refine a more powerful weapon, which was made by smelting various materials according to the rules of the Dao, and those materials alone could be used to refine the Reincarnation Arcana.

And this weapon is called the supreme weapon by him, which is much more powerful than the reincarnation arcana, and it also has a certain increase in his strength.

"Almost, the fruit is about to ripen!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Outside the Great Forbidden Path.

Shaking Shadow, Dongying, is staring at that fruit with great excitement at this moment.

"The Infinite Dao Fruit is finally about to be conceived!"

Shake Shadow was excited.

The two of them have been guarding here for too long, close to the million solstice era!

And this Infinite Supreme Dao Tree has cultivated two million Supreme Dao Epochs here, during which personnel have been transferred, coming and going, and Shaking Shadow is undoubtedly the one who has stayed here the longest.

There is no way, his cultivation is relatively low, and his potential is average, and if the other garrisons break through in cultivation, they can leave here, and there is no need to waste time staying here.

It's too boring to stay here, and there are no other opportunities, how can you break through the cultivation?

Although the Forbidden Dao Great Array contains a trace of Supreme Dao rules, and it can be used to comprehend Supreme Dao rules, but when the Supreme Dao Rule realm reaches a certain level, this Forbidden Dao Great Array is of no use.

And he hasn't improved his strength for hundreds of thousands of Dao Eras, so he desperately wants to get out of here!

"When this Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit is born, we can return with this Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, and when the time comes, a lot of resources will be given from above, and our strength can go further!" Shaking Shadow said excitedly.

"Well, hopefully there won't be any accidents!" said Dongying.

"How could there be an accident? This is the territory of our Infinite Heavenly Palace, and other forces dare not come here. Moreover, this place is relatively remote, and the news of the cultivation of the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit in the Wuji Heavenly Palace has always been secret, even if it is the Wuji Heavenly Palace, not many people know about it, so there will be no accidents. Shadow said.

"Hmm!"

Dongying nodded.

Airplanes!!!!!

The Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit began to absorb the energy of the Infinite Supreme Dao Tree, and the entire Infinite Supreme Dao Tree was about to wither.

But it doesn't matter, anyway, a Infinite Supreme Dao Tree can only cultivate one Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, which is an inevitable outcome.

Rumble!!!!

The Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit emitted terrifying energy, and the entire Infinite Supreme Dao Tree was completely turned into ashes.

"It's done!"

Shake Shadow said excitedly.

When the Wuji Dao Fruit energy was restrained, he could take it away.

Gradually, the energy of the Wuji Dao Fruit began to converge and gradually turned into a cyan fruit.

But at this moment, a figure instantly rushed out from the origin of the reincarnation domain.

This person is Ye Tian.
